entries.name: Alien
entries.description: A crew encounters a deadly extraterrestrial.

entries.name: Aliens
entries.description: Marines return to the extraterrestrial-infested colony.

entries.name: Amelie
entries.description: A whimsical Parisian woman changes lives around her.

entries.name: Annabelle
entries.description: A vintage doll wreaks horror on a young couple.

entries.name: Get Out
entries.description: A black man uncovers horror secrets at his white girlfriend's family estate.

entries.name: Hereditary
entries.description: A family unravels terrifying secrets after their grandmother's death.

entries.name: Hostel
entries.description: Backpackers fall victim to a horror torture ring.

entries.name: Insidious
entries.description: A family is haunted by horror entities from another realm.

entries.name: It Comes at Night
entries.description: Survivors hide from a horror plague with paranoia and mistrust.

entries.name: It Follows
entries.description: A supernatural force transmits horror through sexual encounters.

entries.name: Midsommar
entries.description: A couple attends a pagan festival that turns into a horror nightmare.

entries.name: Saw
entries.description: Two men wake up trapped in a room by a horror puzzle-maker.

entries.name: Sinister
entries.description: A true-crime writer finds horror footage of past murders.

entries.name: Smile
entries.description: A horror curse spreads through a disturbing smile.

entries.name: Terrifier
entries.description: A horror clown terrorizes victims on Halloween night.

entries.name: The Babadook
entries.description: A horror pop-up book creature torments a mother and son.

entries.name: The Conjuring
entries.description: Paranormal investigators help a family terrorized by a dark presence.

entries.name: The Descent
entries.description: Cavers encounter horror humanoid creatures in an uncharted system.

entries.name: The Lighthouse
entries.description: Two lighthouse keepers descend into horror madness on a remote island.

entries.name: The Nun
entries.description: A horror nun haunts a priest and novitiate in Romania.

entries.name: The Witch
entries.description: A Puritan family faces horror in 1630s New England wilderness.

entries.name: Us
entries.description: A family fights their horror doppelgangers during a beach vacation.
